ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE TO PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL SET FOR DEC-14-2006 CONTINUED TO JAN-11-2007 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH SAN FRANCISCO SUPERIOR COURT EARLY SETTLEMENT PROGRAM POLICIES AND PROCEDURES NO 4. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT SHAKER DAHUD'S MOTION TO EXPUNGE NOTICE OF PENDING ACTION - CLAIM RELATED TO REAL PROPERTY. PLAINTIFF HAS CARRIED BURDEN OF PROBABILITY OF SUCCESS. MOTION GRANTED PROVIDED DEFENDANT MAKE UNDERTAKING IN THE FORM OF SECOND DEED OF TRUST ON HIS MILLBRAE PROPERTY AS ORIGINALLY AGREED OR A DEED OF TRUST ON PROPERTY WITH EQUAL OR GREATER EQUITY OR SOME OTHER UNDERTAKING WITH EQUAL OR GREATER VALUE. IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO SHOW FULFILLMENT OF THIS CONDITION ON OR BEFORE NOVEMBER 16, 2006 THE COURT WILL DENY MOTION TO EXPUNGE WITHOUT FURTHER NOTICE OR HEARING. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189

PHILLIP MINTER, ESQ. APPEARED FOR PLAINTIFF TO REQUEST THAT THE ACTION NOT BE DISMISSED AND THAT A HEARING DATE BE GIVEN FOR PLAINTIFF'S PROPOSED MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO BREACH OF SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. THERE BEING NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT, AND GOOD CAUSE APPEARING, THE CASE IS NOT DISMISSED AND PLAINTIFF'S PROPOSED MOTION WILL BE HEARD IN DEPT. 303 BEFORE THE HONORABLE JULIE TANG ON JULY 2, 2007 AT 9:00, OR AS SOON THEREAFTER AS THE MATTER MAY BE HEARD. MINI MINUTES: No appearance. ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE TO PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL, for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures Number 4, (Administrative fee) is heard this day. Court ordered Plaintiff's counsel sanctioned $100.00 for failure to appear. The OSC is continued to Jan-11-2007 at 10:30 AM, Dept. 212. Proceedings reported by:Mary Ellen Scherer, CSR # 5208 (212)

MOTION TO EXPUNGE LIS PENDENS/PENDENCY OF ACTION
Off Calendar Oct-31-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT SHAKER DAHUD'S MOTION TO EXPUNGE NOTICE OF PENDING ACTION.
RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - CLAIM RELATED TO REAL PROPERTY. PLAINTIFF HAS CARRIED BURDEN OF PROBABILITY OF SUCCESS. MOTION GRANTED PROVIDED DEFENDANT MAKE UNDERTAKING IN THE FORM OF SECOND DEED OF TRUST ON HIS MILLBRAE PROPERTY AS ORIGINALLY AGREED OR A DEED OF TRUST ON PROPERTY WITH EQUAL OR GREATER EQUITY OR SOME OTHER UNDERTAKING WITH EQUAL OR GREATER VALUE. IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO SHOW FULFILLMENT OF THIS CONDITION ON OR BEFORE NOVEMBER 16, 2006 THE COURT WILL DENY MOTION TO EXPUNGE WITHOUT FURTHER NOTICE OR HEARING. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT FORM OF ORDER. (301/PJB/CK) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
